scripts.extension:build:firefox: BUILD_TARGET=extension dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @focusdive/extension build && cp apps/extension/manifest.firefox.json apps/extension/dist/manifest.json
scripts.extension:build:chrome: BUILD_TARGET=extension dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @focusdive/extension build && cp apps/extension/manifest.chrome.json apps/extension/dist/manifest.json
